{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614575721427551038","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，好看的同时还好笑[怒]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772911552,"group_id":"7549828017040673854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+c6Xu9PPy5yxBXc1f2pUtKf/PO7E7D+3zXoIv/+PC1g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1921e3bef988463cafe37153136b0097~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882078&x-signature=DthudO%2F9TxfxWmgPeq%2F%2Fmv6wtoo%3D","user_id":"2615069766329931","user_name":"对它用炎拳吧！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2615069766329931","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549828017040673854","book_info":{"abstract":"在不同的世界，用不同世界人的力量来进行游玩。当复联一突然冒出一个雷霆沙赞会怎样？环太平洋里面突如其来出现的哥斯拉作何解释？复联三已经被特利迦击杀的灭霸，复联四又被赛亚人打死，这一切究竟为哪般？神秘的魔法学院霍格沃茨火焰杯开赛，当即为何伏地魔突然出现唱起了DJ？这一切都需要问里昂，但里昂表示。
“我不知道，我就是到那旅游一圈，找个漂亮妹子，然后度过愉快的一夜。什么叫你看到我和变形金刚一起去开房了，这是诽谤，你等着收传票吧。我从来没和变形金刚一起去酒店睡过。那叫报应号，你个什么都不懂的家伙。”
很明显，里昂先生对于这些他也不是很清楚。他矢口否认了抢夺数个主角的女朋友，他表示，大家都是成年人，解决需求罢了，并不会介入生活的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2offf6648b47c2a3378641a15b2574a365~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"牢徐的快乐你想象的到","author_id":"","book_id":"7549828017040673854","book_name":"万界以轮转旅行","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4531人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":374,"name":"漫威","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=374&name=漫威&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7549828962105442878","read_count":"4531","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"622930"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"286","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,漫威,诸天万界,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2offf6648b47c2a3378641a15b2574a365~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466650&x-signature=%2BlFg7ZKB5RaKeaqWYP5JTS8hjXk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3391331467277356","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"213"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_
